creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209187
update p5-Image-Sane to version 5

upstream has released some new versions of Image::Sane and changed the version numbering scheme - latest is version 5. The update is trivial, passes poudriere and works fine with gscan2pdf (old and new versions).
While here, add LICENSE ("same as perl itself..."), no full license text has been included in the upstream distribution, but it's in the included README and the online documentation.
